title: lycopodium cassandrae
intro: Lycopodium cassandrae, also known as Lycopodium, is a type of evergreen plant belonging to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium cassandrae include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, Lycopodium cassandrae is often used in the form of tinctures, teas, and capsules, and is also incorporated into topical creams and ointments to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
